<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-539" location="lines:539-544" -->
```bash
   APP_PROVIDER_USER_ID=$(curl -s "http://localhost:3975/v2/users" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $PROVIDER_ADMIN_TOKEN" | \
     jq -r '.users[] | select(.metadata.annotations.username == "app-provider") | .id')
   
   echo "APP_PROVIDER_USER_ID: $APP_PROVIDER_USER_ID"

```
